omitted_declarations.policy_reference: We may share your information with third-party companies that provide services on our behalf, such as analytics providers (e.g., Google Analytics, Amplitude, Mixpanel, and Segment), advertising partners (e.g., Google AdMob and Facebook Audience Network), cloud storage providers (e.g., Google Cloud Platform and Amazon Web Services), payment processors (e.g., Stripe and PayPal), and customer support providers (e.g., Zendesk).

We may share your information with third-party companies that provide services on our behalf, such as analytics providers (e.g., Google Analytics, Amplitude, Mixpanel, and Segment), advertising partners (e.g., Google AdMob and Facebook Audience Network), cloud storage providers (e.g., Google Cloud Platform and Amazon Web Services), payment processors (e.g., Stripe and PayPal), and customer support providers (e.g., Zendesk).

Business Transfers. We may share or transfer your information in connection with, or during negotiations of, any merger, sale of company assets, financing, or acquisition of all or a portion of our business to another company.
